title: Verify existing implementation of audit logger
description: The audit logger implementation already exists at src/services/audit-logger.ts with logAuditEvent(event: { action: string; userId: string; resource: string; details?: string }): void that appends JSONL entries to a file. Comprehensive tests exist at src/services/audit-logger.test.ts with 5 test cases covering: basic JSONL append, optional details field, multiple entries without overwrite, ISO timestamp inclusion, and entries without optional details. All 5 tests pass.
existing_patterns: src/services/notifications.ts - Class-based service with constructor dependency
